Contact.metaDescription: Write to Xten Partners to begin a discreet conversation about a mandate or transformation context.
Contact.title: Contact
Contact.intro: To open an exchange—not to send a lead.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.messageHint: Outline the context in a few lines. No sensitive personal data is required at this stage.
Contact.consentRich: I agree that my information may be used to respond to my request, in line with the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.
Contact.consentError: Please accept the terms to send your message.
Contact.success: Thank you. Your message was received. We will respond in a manner appropriate to the context.
Contact.error: Submission failed. You may retry or write to us directly from your work email.

validation.name: Please provide your name.
validation.email: Please provide a valid email address.
validation.messageShort: The message is too short to be useful.

Contact.note: Information submitted is processed to respond to your request. No advertising profiling is performed. Retention is limited to handling the request unless law requires otherwise.
